name: Tor Exit Node Communication Detection
description: Detects and investigates network communication with known Tor exit nodes, which may indicate anonymized data exfiltration, policy violations, or threat actor activity. Riggs AI correlates the Tor traffic against the user's role, data accessed, and organizational policy. Policy violations or suspected exfiltration trigger traffic blocking, user investigation, manager notification, and compliance ticket creation. Authorized Tor usage (e.g., threat intelligence research) is documented and exempted.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block Tor exit node communication and enforce network policy

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Investigate endpoint process responsible for Tor communication

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security team and user's manager of Tor usage

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects communication with known Tor exit nodes or anonymization services

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the Tor communication: identify the source user/host, data volume transferred, accessed resources, user's department/role, and whether Tor usage is authorized per policy. Determine if this is data exfiltration, policy violation, or authorized use.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of Tor traffic context including user role, data volume, resource access patterns, and policy compliance
Routes based on whether the Tor usage is unauthorized, a policy violation, or indicative of data exfiltration

parameters.comment: Tor exit node blocked — User: {{trigger_1.alert.username}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Blocks outbound traffic to the Tor exit node to stop ongoing anonymized communication

config.additional_instructions: Investigate the user's recent endpoint and network activity. Check for data staging, large file access, removable media usage, and other exfiltration indicators. Identify what data may have been sent through the Tor tunnel.
config.description: AI-powered investigation of the user's recent activity to identify data that may have been exfiltrated through the Tor connection
Creates an investigation ticket with full Tor usage context and user activity analysis for security and HR follow-up
Notifies the security team and triggers manager notification about the unauthorized Tor usage

parameters.note: Tor communication by {{trigger_1.alert.username}} reviewed — Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. Usage determined to be authorized ({{analyze_1.authorization_reason}}). Documented and exempted from future alerts for this user/destination.

config.description: Documents authorized Tor usage (e.g., threat intel research) and creates an exception to prevent future false positive alerts
Tor exit node communication detection workflow complete
